prompt: Design a technical plan for migrating a monolithic search ranking service into a staged retrieval pipeline. Include options, trade-offs, risks, and validation steps.
expected: Creates a self-contained HTML implementation plan instead of a long inline answer; includes top-right Export PDF button, print CSS, table of contents/目录, 原始方案全文 / Original Markdown Plan section, 建议批准语 / Suggested Approval Phrase section, copy buttons for 复制批准语 and 复制 markdown 原文, validation evidence, and best-effort auto-open.

prompt: Compare three architecture options for an internal configuration center and recommend one. The response should be detailed enough for a design review.
expected: Uses an HTML artifact with side-by-side option cards, decision criteria, explicit recommendation, risks, evidence/assumptions, table-of-contents navigation, 原始方案全文 and 建议批准语 handoff sections, copy buttons, Export PDF, and auto-open attempt.

prompt: In two sentences, explain when to use HTML instead of markdown.
expected: Does not over-trigger; returns a short inline answer because the user requested a short text response.
